'''Cloud9 Challenger''' was a North American Challenger team. It is not to be confused with [[Cloud9 Tempest]].

== History ==
'''Cloud9 Challenger''' was announced as a new team being built by parent organization [[Cloud9]] in August 2015, to be built around former Cloud9 starting jungler [[Meteos]], after he was replaced on the main roster by [[Hai]].<ref name="meteosform">[http://cloud9.gg/news/meteos-tryouts Cloud9 to Hold Open Tryouts for Challenger Roster] ''cloud9.gg''</ref> The team held open tryouts, and in October, [[KEITHMCBRIEF]] was announced as their AD carry.<ref name="keithjoin">[http://cloud9.gg/news/keithmcbrief-joins KEITHMCBRIEF Joins Cloud9 for Challenger Team] ''cloud9.gg''</ref> Starting in early November 2015, C9C participated in the [[HTC Ascension]] tournament. After making it through the group stage, they were eliminated in the quarterfinals and disbanded.
